review_contract.git_history: current git log -n 20 for each source path
review_contract.snapshot_scope: validate the embedded 2,154-file manifest and digest
review_contract.fail_close: unsupported retain becomes challenge_required; no supersede/retire

correction_policy.retain_overclassified_challenge_required: change adjudication to explicit_challenge before any terminal custody receipt
correction_policy.challenge_retain_candidate: requires independent human/runtime judgement before retain

active_authority_hits.command: bun run src/cli.ts db rebuild && bun run src/cli.ts doctor
